reasoning: Banning a political party in Germany requires a formal proceeding before the Federal Constitutional Court (BVerfG). Historically, such proceedings take several years from the initial application to a final ruling (for example, the NPD ban proceedings took 3-4 years). The Bundestag only debated whether to file an application for a ban in late January 2025, and there is disagreement on whether to proceed at all. News reports from May 2025 still discuss the potential ban as a hypothetical or ongoing debate, indicating no ruling has been made. Given that it is already May 2025, there is absolutely no possibility that the complex constitutional process required to formally ban the AfD could be completed before the July 1, 2025 deadline. I estimate the probability at the minimum allowable threshold.
